examples.question: Mua 1 airpods giao Ha Noi, tong bao nhieu VND?
examples.ideal_answer: AirPods hien het hang trong kho. Chung toi xin tu choi don hang nay. (no total)

examples.question: Mua 2 iPad dung ma SALE15 ship Da Nang het bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer:
Da kiem tra ton kho iPad, ap dung ma giam gia SALE15 va tinh phi giao hang den Da Nang.
Tong cong: 17000000 VND
